headline: Answers people search before they buy a website
subheadline: This section helps both customers and AI search tools understand exactly who we help, what we build, and how quickly we can launch.

items.question: Do you build affordable websites for small businesses?
items.answer: Yes. Pixflow Studio creates affordable websites for small businesses, local service providers, and solo founders who want a professional online presence without a large upfront cost.

items.question: Can you create a website for a new business quickly?
items.answer: Yes. We focus on fast website setup for new businesses and can usually launch within 48 to 72 hours after content approval, depending on the package and how ready the materials are.

items.question: What is included in your website creation service?
items.answer: Our website creation service includes custom design, development, hosting, SSL, mobile-friendly layouts, technical SEO foundations, and ongoing support depending on the plan you choose.

items.question: Is this a good option if I need a cheap website to get started?
items.answer: If you want a simple, low-risk way to get online, our monthly plans are designed as a practical alternative to paying a large one-time fee for a starter business website.

items.question: Who is Pixflow Studio best for?
items.answer: We are best for local businesses, startups, freelancers, and new business owners who need a fast, modern, and easy-to-manage website that is ready for Google Search and AI discovery tools.

items.question: Do you only work in Bulgaria?
items.answer: We are based in Bulgaria and primarily serve businesses in Bulgaria and the EU, but our website design and launch process also works well for English-speaking service businesses in other markets.
